# Orun.AI

> Orun.AI is a Next.js test project for an AI workforce platform focused on commercial operations, specialized agents, auditable workflows and MCP-based integrations.

The repository has been intentionally reduced to a small canonical documentation set. Treat the codebase as the source of truth for implemented behavior and use the files below according to their roles.

## Core Docs

- [README.md](./README.md): Human-facing overview, current capabilities, stack and local setup.
- [prd.md](./prd.md): Product requirements, users, scope and non-goals for the MVP.
- [AGENTS.md](./AGENTS.md): Canonical instructions for coding agents working in this repository.
- [DESIGN.md](./DESIGN.md): Visual identity and design-system rules in a Google Stitch compatible format.

## Historical Context

- [.mimocode/learning.md](./.mimocode/learning.md): Preserved project memory; read-only historical learning log.

## Optional

- [CLAUDE.md](./CLAUDE.md): Thin wrapper that points Claude-compatible tooling back to `AGENTS.md`.
